retrospective.summary: Converted the new update skill into a template-backed claw skill package with a thin entry, a skill-local TEMPLATE.json, an adjacent non-claw fallback, and explicit coverage documentation. The generated template now validates by template id and preserves the original update workflow across entry routing, host-specific install steps, verification, and guardrails.

keyDecisions: The update skill now uses a skill-local TEMPLATE.json plus a thin SKILL.md entry instead of keeping all execution guidance inline.
The original non-claw update instructions are preserved in an adjacent non-claw-fallback.md file rather than being discarded during conversion.
The converted update workflow keeps host routing explicit with Codex, OpenCode, and conservative fallback branches before install commands run.
